meaning: n.希腊字母的第一个字母
examples: We broke up into groups, and each group designed its own toy and made an alpha prototype.
The company shut all four of its Brent platforms, Alpha, Bravo, Charlie, and Delta, in January for repairs.
The predictive signal is a steady rhythm of alpha waves emanating from the brain's right hemisphere, which are closely associated with relaxing activities.
Remember in 2011, even Goldman Sachs would close down their quant Global Alpha fund.
Global Alpha is said to have lost 12% in the last two weeks of July alone.
